I now have all the information needed. `FileField` is in `django/forms/fields.py`, inherits from `Field`, and the method that handles all three states (new file, clear, keep initial) including the `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` error path is `clean`.

```json
{"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"FileField.clean() sits above to_python() and distinguishes all three states: it raises a ValidationError with the 'contradiction' code when data is FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (both a file and the clear checkbox were submitted), returns False (or re-validates as None) when data is False (clear checkbox alone), returns the initial value unchanged when no new data was provided, and otherwise delegates to super().clean() — which calls to_python() — for the newly uploaded file."}
```

parsed_answer.fix_summary: FileField.clean() sits above to_python() and distinguishes all three states: it raises a ValidationError with the 'contradiction' code when data is FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (both a file and the clear checkbox were submitted), returns False (or re-validates as None) when data is False (clear checkbox alone), returns the initial value unchanged when no new data was provided, and otherwise delegates to super().clean() — which calls to_python() — for the newly uploaded file.
